first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions identify the same core strengths (distributed systems, mentorship, project leadership) and the same core weaknesses (limited recent C++ experience, lack of direct cloud architecture experience, and leadership not focused on the required domain). The minor differences in phrasing fall within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the university attended. The model's evaluation remains consistently focused on the candidate's professional experience.
